settings.heading: Support for products, downloads, and orders
settings.copy: Choose downloads, manuals, compatibility, or direct support based on what you need.
settings.support_note: Each path keeps the product and order context in view so you can move forward with the right information.

settings.heading: Choose the support path
settings.copy: Most questions start with a file, a manual, compatibility guidance, or direct support.

settings.title: Find a download
settings.copy: Use downloads when you need a driver, utility, or firmware file for a product you already own.

settings.title: Find a manual
settings.copy: Use manuals when you need setup steps, a quick-start guide, or product instructions.

settings.title: Check compatibility
settings.copy: Check device, platform, and workflow compatibility before you buy or install.

settings.title: Get help now
settings.copy: Contact support when the answer depends on your product, order, or warranty details.

settings.heading: Need help with a specific product or order?
settings.copy: Send one support request and we will route product, order, or warranty help from the same place.
